title: aizopsis selskiana
intro: Aizopsis selskiana, also known as the Siberian aizopsis, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Aizopsis selskiana can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system.
